name: maxym-ai-ads
description: Unified paid advertising skill for Claude Code: strategy, creative, multi-platform audit, and reporting. Closed-loop guidance: /ads blueprint produces the plan, /ads blueprint-execution puts it into practice — from gap fixing and pixel installation to click-by-click campaign build, launch day sequencing, and the bi-weekly optimization loop (3× Kill Rule, 20% Scaling Rule, creative fatigue detection). Adaptive output for beginner / intermediate / expert users. 32 sub-skills, 15 parallel subagents, 250+ checks across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, YouTube, and Apple Ads.
